query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, publishedModel, publishedToFeed, modelTotal, awayModelSpread, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore FROM games WHERE sport = 'MLB' AND gameDate = '2026-03-30' AND id >= 2250063 ORDER BY id;
